ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service */,
  "service_center" TEXT /* Name of the service center where the vehicle was last serviced */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic parameter */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of diagnostic parameter (e.g., engine, transmission, brakes) */,
  "threshold_low" REAL /* Lower threshold for the parameter */,
  "threshold_high" REAL /* Upper threshold for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnostic parameter */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the parameter to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_parameters_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement item */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic parameter the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement item */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the measurement item */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the measurement item */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the item */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance level for the measurement item */,
  "critical" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the item is critical */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the measurement item to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_items_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic note */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement item the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the diagnostic note */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who created the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the note */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the note to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_notes_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES measurement_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_notes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle reading */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the reading belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement item the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who took the reading */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the reading was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reading to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_readings_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_readings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_readings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES measurement_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the technician (e.g., mechanic, service manager) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the technician */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the technician belongs to */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic session */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the session belongs to */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician conducting the session */,
  "session_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the diagnostic session */,
  "session_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the diagnostic session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session was conducted */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the session to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_sessions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_sessions_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session reading */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic session the reading belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement item the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Time the reading was taken */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., normal, abnormal) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the reading was taken */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the reading to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_readings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES measurement_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_readings_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_items" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action item */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the diagnostic session the action item belongs to */,
  "action_text" TEXT /* Text of the action item */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action item (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the technician assigned to the action item */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the action item */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the action item (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the action item */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the action item to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES diagnostic_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_action_items_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)
